chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-442 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1818/19 (urgent application) 2. For orders on M.A 1819/19 (exemption application) 3. For hearing of main case 23.08.2019. Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Siddiqui, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. 1&2. Granted. 3. The petitioner is seeking protection against harassment caused to him allegedly by respondent No.4, who is his ex-wife. There appears to be a family dispute between the petitioner and respondent No.4 over custody of minors, which is reflected from the annexure filed along with this petition and therefore, this petition is not maintainable, which is accordingly dismissed in limine. However, the petitioner may avail remedy before proper forum if he is so advised. JUDGE Ali Haider
